```c
pthread_mutex_lock() // one thread allowed at a time! (others will have to wait here)
// ... Do Critical Section stuff here!
pthread_mutex_unlock() // let other waiting threads continue
```

```c
#define N 16
void *b[N]
int in = 0, out = 0
p_m_t lock
sem_t s1,s2
void init() {
 p_m_init(&lock, NULL)
 sem_init(&s1, 0, 16)
 sem_init(&s2, 0, 0)
}

enqueue(void *value) {
 p_m_lock(&lock)

 // Hint: Wait while zero. Decrement and return
 sem_wait( &s1 )

 b[ (in++) & (N-1) ] = value

 // Hint: Increment. Will wake up a waiting thread
 sem_post(&s1)
 p_m_unlock(&lock)
}
void *dequeue(){
 p_m_lock(&lock)
 sem_wait(&s2)
 void *result = b[(out++) & (N-1) ]
 sem_post(&s2)
 p_m_unlock(&lock)
 return result
}
```

```c
void *b[16]
int in = 0, out = 0
p_m_t lock
sem_t s1, s2
void init() {
 sem_init(&s1,0,16)
 sem_init(&s2,0,0)
}

enqueue(void *value){
 sem_wait(&s2)
 p_m_lock(&lock)

 b[ (in++) & (N-1) ] = value

 p_m_unlock(&lock)
 sem_post(&s1)
}

void *dequeue(){
 sem_wait(&s1)
 p_m_lock(&lock)
 void *result = b[(out++) & (N-1)]
 p_m_unlock(&lock)
 sem_post(&s2)

 return result;
}
```
